login.tagline: Log your lifts. Smash your PRs.
login.registerTagline: Create your account to start tracking.
login.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Log In
login.registerSuccess: Registration successful! A confirmation email has been sent. You can now log in.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

errors.atLeastOneMetric: Please add at least one value (Weight, Reps, or Time).

percentageCalculator.title: RM Percentage Calculator
percentageCalculator.noPBs: Log a 'Weight' personal best to use this feature.
percentageCalculator.lessThanBarbell: Weight is less than or equal to the barbell.

shareAndInfo.infoText: For an app-like experience, install BULLBOX on your device! Look for the 'Add to Home Screen' or 'Install' option in your browser menu.

personalBests.title: Personal Bests
personalBests.noPBs: Your personal bests will appear here as you log workouts.

trainingSchedule.title: Training Schedule
trainingSchedule.noSessions: No upcoming sessions. Schedule a workout to stay on track!

workoutHistory.title: Workout History
workoutHistory.noRecords: No records found. Add a workout to get started!
workoutHistory.logTwoRecords: Log at least two records for this exercise to see a progress chart.

modals.loadingAnalysis: Coach Bull is analyzing your performance...

errors.allFieldsRequired: Title, date, and time are required.

modals.resetPasswordPrompt: Enter your email and we'll send a link to get back into your account.
